mapper.select:
SELECT n.ntc_oid, n.ntc_nm, n.ntc_cn, n.ntc_cn_txt, n.bgng_dt, n.end_dt, n.open_yn, n.use_yn, n.inq_cnt, n.reg_id, n.reg_dt, n.mdfcn_id, n.mdfcn_dt, IF(CURDATE() >= n.bgng_dt AND (n.end_dt IS NULL OR n.end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') AS upend_fix_yn FROM ${schema}.ntc n
n.use_yn = 'Y' AND n.open_yn = 'Y'
AND
n.ntc_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
n.ntc_cn_txt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
(n.ntc_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.ntc_cn_txt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY upend_fix_yn DESC, n.ntc_oid DESC
SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm, ntc_cn, ntc_cn_txt, bgng_dt, end_dt, upend_fix_yn, open_yn, use_yn, inq_cnt, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE ntc_oid = #{ntc_oid}

SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm FROM ( SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm, IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') AS upend_fix_yn FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') DESC, ntc_oid DESC ) AS sorted_list WHERE (upend_fix_yn, ntc_oid) < ( SELECT IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N'), ntc_oid FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE ntc_oid = #{ntcOid} ) ORDER BY upend_fix_yn DESC, ntc_oid DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm FROM ( SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm, IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') AS upend_fix_yn FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N') DESC, ntc_oid DESC ) AS sorted_list WHERE (upend_fix_yn, ntc_oid) > ( SELECT IF(CURDATE() >= bgng_dt AND (end_dt IS NULL OR end_dt >= CURDATE()), 'Y', 'N'), ntc_oid FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE ntc_oid = #{ntcOid} ) ORDER BY upend_fix_yn ASC, ntc_oid ASC LIMIT 1
